role.name: Sending-XIS
role.description: XIS of the healthcare provider that initiates the transfer

category.name: Nictiz-only
category.description: For internal testing only, not to be used by implementers. This test is only executed by the Sending-XIS role and is only executed when the category property is set to "Nictiz-only". This test contains test cases that are only relevant for Nictiz and are not relevant for implementers.
